title: Information Technology Support Engineer
description: We are looking for an IT Support Engineer to maintain our network infrastructure and provide help desk support to staff. You will manage user accounts in Active Directory, troubleshoot hardware and software issues, administer Windows Server environments, and write SQL queries to investigate data issues. Experience with cloud platforms and automation is a bonus.

title: Business Development Manager
description: Our organisation is hiring a Business Development Manager to identify new business opportunities, build client relationships and grow revenue. You will carry out market research, run outbound prospecting campaigns and negotiate contracts with new customers, reporting on pipeline using our CRM.

title: Staff Accountant
description: We require a detail-oriented Staff Accountant to maintain the general ledger, process accounts payable and receivable, prepare financial statements and complete monthly bank reconciliations. You will support the finance team during tax season and year-end audits.

title: Legal Advocate
description: A busy legal practice is seeking a Legal Advocate to conduct legal research, review contracts, manage litigation case files and ensure regulatory compliance for clients. Strong written communication and time management are essential.

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description: We are hiring a Mechanical Design Engineer to produce technical drawings in AutoCAD, run simulations in MATLAB and oversee quality control on the production line. You will support inspection processes and help drive continuous improvement initiatives.

title: Financial Analyst
description: The finance team needs a Financial Analyst to build forecasts, manage budgets, monitor cash flow and produce financial reporting for senior management. You will analyse financial statements to identify trends and support strategic decision-making.

title: Executive Chef
description: A busy restaurant is seeking an Executive Chef to design menus, manage food safety standards, control costs and lead the kitchen brigade. You will oversee inventory, banquet events and catering orders whilst maintaining consistent food quality.

title: Healthcare Coordinator
description: We are recruiting a Healthcare Coordinator to deliver patient care, maintain electronic health records and ensure HIPAA compliance across the clinic. Familiarity with clinical terminology and vital signs monitoring is required.

title: Aviation Logistics Coordinator
description: An aviation services provider needs a Logistics Coordinator to manage supply chain operations, oversee fleet maintenance scheduling and ensure quality assurance across dispatch operations, in line with FAA regulations.

title: IT Consultant
description: We are seeking an IT Consultant to advise clients on network architecture, administer databases and support enterprise systems including VPN and Citrix environments. You will consult on Oracle database performance and Windows infrastructure upgrades.
